shellCommands.command:
/bin/bash -lc "cp /home/user/workspace/dist/vectorops-0.1.0* /home/user/workspace/packages/ && cat > /home/user/workspace/simple/index.html <<'EOF' <"'!DOCTYPE html> vectorops EOF cat > /home/user/workspace/simple/vectorops/index.html <<'"'EOF' <"'!DOCTYPE html> vectorops-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl
vectorops-0.1.0.tar.gz EOF '

/bin/bash -lc 'if [ -f /home/user/workspace/pypi-server.pid ] && kill -0 "$(cat /home/user/workspace/pypi-server.pid)" 2>/dev/null; then kill "$(cat /home/user/workspace/pypi-server.pid)"; fi
nohup python3 -m http.server 8080 --bind 127.0.0.1 --directory /home/user/workspace >/home/user/workspace/pypi-server.log 2>&1 &
echo $! > /home/user/workspace/pypi-server.pid
sleep 1
cat /home/user/workspace/pypi-server.pid'

/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import socket
s = socket.socket()
try:
    s.bind(('127.0.0.1', 8080))
except OSError as e:
    print(f'bind-failed: {e}')
else:
    print('bind-ok')
finally:
    s.close()
PY"

/bin/bash -lc 'if [ -f /home/user/workspace/pypi-server.pid ] && kill -0 "$(cat /home/user/workspace/pypi-server.pid)" 2>/dev/null; then kill "$(cat /home/user/workspace/pypi-server.pid)"; fi
setsid python3 -m http.server 8080 --bind 127.0.0.1 --directory /home/user/workspace >/home/user/workspace/pypi-server.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & echo $! > /home/user/workspace/pypi-server.pid
sleep 2
ps -p "$(cat /home/user/workspace/pypi-server.pid)" -f
'

/bin/bash -lc 'python3 -m venv /home/user/workspace/.test-venv && /home/user/workspace/.test-venv/bin/pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && /home/user/workspace/.test-venv/bin/python -c "from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1]); print(dotproduct([1,2,3],[4,5,6]))"'
